findings.description: Task 5.2 was missing from tasks.md — numbering jumped from 5.1 to 5.3. No task for Android intent filter config.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: tasks.md rewritten with corrected numbering. Android intent filter added as task 6.4 (marked as scaffolded/deferred).

findings.description: Deep linking for 'aca://' URL scheme was mentioned in proposal.md but had no tasks, specs, or design decisions.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Deep linking deferred to a separate proposal (design decision 12). Removed from proposal.md scope. The share target uses App Group IPC, not URL scheme deep links.

findings.description: iOS Share Extension IPC mechanism was undefined — extension runs in separate process with no access to WKWebView.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Design decision 4 now specifies App Group shared container + UserDefaults suite for data passing. Extension writes URL to shared container; main app reads on appStateChange. native-share-target spec updated with extension IPC scenarios.

findings.description: Share Extension cannot authenticate API calls — separate process has no access to cookie jar or credentials.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Design decision 4 specifies that the extension queues URLs in the App Group shared container and the main app processes them on activation (already has valid auth context). No credential sharing across processes.

findings.description: Push notification spec referenced device registration but didn't address who sends APNs pushes. Backend SSE doesn't reach backgrounded apps.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Push scoped to foreground local notifications (MVP) in design decision 7. Spec updated with explicit foreground/background scenarios. APNs integration deferred to follow-up.

findings.description: Proposal stated 'No new backend services' but real push notifications require server-side APNs integration.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Impact section updated to 'Minimal backend changes — add Capacitor native origins to CORS configuration'. APNs explicitly deferred.

findings.description: Offline share queue had no design decision for storage mechanism, retry trigger, or dedup strategy.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Design decision 8 specifies Capacitor Preferences for storage, @capacitor/network for retry trigger, and URL-based dedup. Spec updated with queue flush and dedup scenarios. Tasks 6.9-6.11 added.

findings.description: Plugin table listed '@capacitor/share' under 'Share target' which implies receiving, but the plugin only supports outgoing shares.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Plugin table split into 'Share target (outgoing)' and 'Share target (receiving)' rows. Receiving row explicitly notes 'Custom native code: iOS Share Extension + Android intent filter (no plugin)'.

findings.description: No URL validation in share handler for untrusted input from other apps.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Task 6.6 added for URL validation (reject non-http(s) schemes, enforce max length, sanitize). Spec updated with 'URL Validation' requirement including scenarios for valid URLs, rejected schemes, and oversized URLs. Test task 12.4 added.

findings.description: Haptic feedback limited to exactly two interactions with no rationale.
findings.resolution: Accepted as-is for MVP scope. Two interactions (voice input toggle, content save) are reasonable starting points.

findings.description: Task 1.6 left git convention for ios/ and android/ directories unresolved.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Design decision 9 specifies committing native directories to git (Capacitor convention). Task 1.6 updated to reflect the resolved decision.

findings.description: No task or spec addressed CORS for capacitor://localhost — all native API calls would fail without it.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Design decision 11 addresses CORS for Capacitor origins. New task group 4 (Backend CORS Configuration) with tasks 4.1-4.3. Spec updated with CORS requirement and scenarios. Proposal impact section updated.

findings.description: Open question about backend URL configuration was unresolved, blocking build script finalization.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Design decision 10 specifies using existing VITE_API_URL. Build script tasks 10.1-10.2 updated with URL handling. Open questions section renamed to 'Resolved Questions'.

findings.description: Capacitor speech recognition plugin loads native speech framework eagerly, adding startup latency.
findings.resolution: Task 7.1 updated to note lazy initialization requirement.

findings.description: No task for creating privacy policy document required for App Store submission.
findings.resolution: RESOLVED: Task 11.9 added for drafting and hosting privacy policy.

findings.description: macOS CI runner cost not addressed ($0.08/min vs $0.008/min for Linux).
findings.resolution: Task 11.3 updated to trigger on merge to main only (not PRs). Accepted as manageable cost.

findings.description: App versioning strategy (when to bump package.json version) undocumented.
findings.resolution: Accepted — standard semver discipline. TestFlight accepts multiple builds per version string.
